success_envelope.description: The result contains success=true, isError=false, and text content containing the command result as JSON. Commands that create or identify one primary SketchUp entity also expose that entity ID as resourceId.

invalid_arguments.description: A required argument is missing or an argument has an unsupported type or value. No command work is performed.

execution_error.description: SketchUp could not complete the command. The error message explains the failure and data.success is false.

commands.name: create_component
commands.description: Create a grouped primitive in the active SketchUp model.

type.description: Primitive type: cube, cylinder, sphere, or cone.

position.description: Origin as [x, y, z] in model units.

dimensions.description: Width, depth, and height in model units.

success.description: Returns the created group entity ID.

commands.name: delete_component
commands.description: Delete one entity from the active SketchUp model.

success.description: Confirms that the entity was deleted.

commands.name: transform_component
commands.description: Move, rotate, or scale an entity in the active SketchUp model.

position.description: Translation as [x, y, z] in model units.

rotation.description: Rotation about x, y, and z in degrees.

scale.description: Scale factors along x, y, and z.

commands.name: get_selection
commands.description: List the entities currently selected in SketchUp.

success.description: Returns each selected entity's ID and SketchUp type.

commands.name: set_material
commands.description: Apply a named material or hexadecimal color to an entity.

id.description: SketchUp entity ID to receive the material.

material.description: Existing material name, common color name, or #RRGGBB color.

success.description: Returns the entity ID that received the material.

commands.name: export_scene
commands.description: Export the active model to a temporary file.

format.description: Export format: skp, obj, dae, stl, png, jpg, or jpeg.

success.description: Returns the absolute exported file path and selected format.

commands.name: boolean_operation
commands.description: Create the union, difference, or intersection of two grouped entities.

target_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the target solid.

tool_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the tool solid.

delete_originals.description: Delete both source entities after a successful operation.

success.description: Returns the new result group entity ID.

commands.name: create_mortise_tenon
commands.description: Create a mortise and matching tenon between two boards.

mortise_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving the mortise.

tenon_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving the tenon.

success.description: Returns the modified mortise and tenon board entity IDs.

commands.name: create_dovetail
commands.description: Create matching dovetail tails and pins between two boards.

tail_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the tail board.

pin_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the pin board.

num_tails.description: Number of tails and matching pins.

success.description: Returns the modified tail and pin board entity IDs.

commands.name: create_finger_joint
commands.description: Create matching fingers and slots between two boards.

board1_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving fingers.

board2_id.description: SketchUp entity ID of the board receiving slots.

num_fingers.description: Number of fingers and matching slots.

success.description: Returns the modified board entity IDs.

commands.name: eval_ruby
commands.description: Evaluate Ruby source in SketchUp's top-level binding.

success.description: Returns the evaluated value converted to a string.
